key_findings: CHALLENGE 1 — R900001/R900002 invoice de-duplication: CONFIRMED CORRECT. Article 10 of 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md states '同一发票最多报销1次' — the same invoice may be reimbursed at most once. FPDEV900001 (480元) was used by both R900001 and R900002, constituting duplicate-reimbursement risk. Effective January 2025 spend for E9001 office_supplies is 480元 ≤ 600元 threshold. The removal of this group from anomalies is policy-compliant.

CHALLENGE 2 — R900007 (650元 vs 600元 threshold): CONFIRMED VALID ANOMALY. Single invoice FPDEV900007, 650元 for office_supplies. Article 2 of 07_office_communication.md caps office_supplies at 600元/人/月. Article 12 of 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md: '无专项审批时,报销金额不得超过对应制度标准的1.0倍'. Record has special_approval=0, only AR-01 standard approval (部门经理 E9002). No exemption, no tolerance provision, no de minimis rule found in any applicable policy. The 50元 excess (8.3% over cap) is a genuine violation. False-positive challenge REJECTED.

CHALLENGE 3 — R900014+R900015 (340元 vs 300元 threshold): CONFIRMED VALID ANOMALY. Two records with different invoices (FPDEV900014 at 180元, FPDEV900015 at 160元), same employee (E9001), same month (2025-09). Article 3 of 07_office_communication.md caps communication at 300元/人/月. Article 12 of 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md: without special approval, cannot exceed 1.0× the standard. Neither record has special_approval. The 17-day gap between expense dates (Sep 3 and Sep 20) exceeds the 7-day Article 11 split-claim window, so no split-claim violation — but the monthly cap is independently violated. The 40元 excess (13.3% over cap) is a genuine violation. False-positive challenge REJECTED.

POPULATION COMPLETENESS: Verified E9001 April 2025 office_supplies (only R900007), E9001 September 2025 communication (only R900014+R900015), and full reused-invoice scan (only FPDEV900001 with usage_count=2). No hidden records, no missed de-duplication candidates. Department D901 budget (200,000 annual, 36,760 used / 18.38%) is healthy — no budget-overrun exemption under Article 13 of 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md or Article 4 of 08_budget_management.md applies.

POLICY COVERAGE: All applicable policies examined — 07_office_communication.md (Articles 2, 3, 4), 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md (Articles 10, 11, 12, 13), 03_authorization_management.md (Attachment 2 approval tiers), 08_budget_management.md (Article 4 special approval for budget overruns). No policy provides a tolerance band, de minimis exception, or automatic exemption for marginal exceedances.
